overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring an NCPD security facility. The player enters through a glass security checkpoint, approaches a glowing holographic officer at a reception desk, and proceeds into a back room filled with server racks. The environment features dark wood paneling, red velvet ropes, and futuristic police branding.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint entrance with glass doors

events.description: passing through the automatic glass security doors into the NCPD facility

agents.ego_description: walking through the security entrance and approaching the reception area

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer standing behind the glass doors, glowing with bright digital distortion

entered.detail: automatic sliding glass doors with metal frames and yellow warning signs
holographic or digitally distorted police officer in uniform emitting bright light
curved security desk with papers and equipment
mechanical arm holding a screen above the reception desk

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the NCPD security checkpoint, passing through automatic glass doors into a dimly lit lobby. A glowing holographic officer stands visible to the left behind the glass, while a reception desk with a robotic monitor arm comes into view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: reception lobby with security desk and red velvet ropes

events.description: camera circles around the reception desk to view the officer from different angles
officer moves from behind the desk to the side, revealing NCPD logo on his uniform

agents.ego_description: circling the reception desk and observing the NCPD officer and lobby details

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer in glowing blue uniform moving around the reception desk and interacting with the terminal

entered.detail: large golden circular emblem with NCPD insignia and 'Night City' text on the wall
red barrier ropes on stanchions creating a queue line

segments.scene_description: Inside the lobby, the player circles the reception desk where a glowing NCPD officer moves about. The room features dark wood paneling, a large golden NCPD emblem on the back wall, and red velvet rope barriers. The officer's uniform displays 'NCPD' on the back as he moves around the desk area.

scene_state.functional_zone: secure server room with equipment racks

events.description: entering the back room with rows of server equipment and storage racks
camera turns to survey the server racks from the opposite end of the room

agents.ego_description: walking through the server room and examining the equipment rows from multiple angles

entered.detail: rows of dark gray server units and equipment cabinets arranged in parallel lines
recessed rectangular light fixtures in the dropped ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the reception area into a secure back room filled with rows of server racks. The space is dimly lit with ceiling panels, featuring the same dark wood paneling and NCPD emblems on the walls. The camera moves between the equipment rows, exploring the sterile, organized layout of the server room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile security checkpoint into the depths of a high-tech police facility. It begins by passing through automatic glass doors into a dimly lit lobby, where a glowing holographic officer and a robotic monitor arm at a reception desk first come into view. As the camera circles the desk, the environment reveals an opulent interior of dark wood paneling, red velvet rope barriers, and a large golden NCPD emblem on the back wall. The scene then shifts as the camera moves past the reception area and enters a secure back room, transitioning from the open lobby to a narrow space filled with rows of server racks. Finally, the camera glides between the equipment rows, exploring the sterile, organized layout of the server room under dim ceiling panels.
